## Checklist
- [ ] CI green (lint, typecheck, test, build)
- [ ] Tested on the Vercel **preview** deploy
- [ ] Accessibility considered (keyboard, contrast)
- [ ] Performance considered (no new render-blocking / CLS)
- [ ] Risky change is behind a **feature flag** / safe to roll back
